Eduarda, let us start the post-mortem. Overall, how would you rate the outcome?
Positive, but there is one clear lesson. The root cause of the delay was a gap we overlooked early on.
And if we had caught it earlier?
In hindsight, if we had caught it earlier, we would have avoided two weeks of follow-up.
Could it have been worse if the market had moved against us?
Yes. If the downturn had been deeper, the outcome could have been very different.
Good. How do we stop this from happening again?
We have updated the checklist, so the issue should not recur. I will write it up for the debrief notes.
Overall, the outcome was positive, but there is one clear lesson.
The root cause was a gap we overlooked early on.
In hindsight, if we had caught it sooner, we would have avoided the delay.
If the downturn had been deeper, the outcome could have been worse.
We have updated the checklist, so the issue will not recur.

Hi team, here is a quick summary from the Vertex post-mortem. Overall the outcome was positive, but we found one real lesson learned. The root cause of the delay was a reporting gap that we overlooked early on. In hindsight, if we had caught it sooner, we would have avoided two weeks of follow-up. The good news is the issue is unlikely to recur, because we have updated the checklist. If the market downturn had been deeper, the result could have been very different, so we got a bit lucky there too.

Hi Eduarda, quick voicemail before the debrief. I have been writing up the lessons learned from the deal. My main takeaway is about the timeline. If we had escalated the covenant issue earlier, we would not have lost so much time. With hindsight it feels obvious, but at the time the root cause was hard to see. I think the outcome was still strong, and I do not expect the problem to recur. Let us walk through it together in the debrief this afternoon.

The team held a debrief after the deal closed. They looked for the root cause of the delay. They realized they had overlooked an early reporting gap. In hindsight, they agreed they would have acted faster. They wrote up the lesson learned so the problem would not recur.
